name: Arcadium Lithium plc
description: Arcadium Lithium plc is a leading global lithium chemicals producer committed to safely and responsibly harnessing the power of lithium to pioneer a more sustainable world. The company was formed in January 2024 through the merger of Livent Corporation and Allkem Limited. Arcadium Lithium has vertically integrated capabilities across lithium extraction processes, including hard-rock mining, conventional brine extraction, and direct lithium extraction (DLE), with production facilities and operations located in Argentina, Australia, Canada, China, Japan, the United Kingdom, and the United States.
